---
name: Workflow request
about: Suggest a new n8n workflow you'd like to see in this collection

labels: enhancement

## Use case
<!-- What problem would this workflow solve? Who benefits? -->

## Suggested integrations
<!-- Which n8n nodes / services should be involved? (e.g. Slack + OpenAI + Notion) -->

## Inputs / Outputs
<!-- What triggers it? What does it produce? -->

## Approval / human-in-the-loop?
<!-- Should there be a step where a human reviews before the workflow proceeds? -->

## Anything else?
